chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-45 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 & 2 a/w reply as at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.01.2026 Mr. Ali Haider Mahar, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ali Tahir Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Ali Haider Mahar, Advocate, holds brief for Mr. Ali Tahir Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner, and files a statement along with a document showing that on 24.01.2026 at 7:00 p.m., the custody of the child was handed over to the respondent/father in compliance with this Court’s order dated 16.01.2026. Learned counsel submits that at present custody of minor is with petitioner. In view of the above, the purpose of the instant petition stands served and the same is accordingly disposed of, with the direction to the petitioner to abide by the visitation rights as provided in the judgment passed by the learned trial Court. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
